entry.title: Adam's Law: Textual Frequency Law on Large Language Models
entry.summary:
While textual frequency has been validated as relevant to human cognition in reading speed, its relatedness to Large Language Models (LLMs) is seldom studied. We propose a novel research direction in ...

entry.title: FIPO: Eliciting Deep Reasoning with Future-KL Influenced Policy Optimization
entry.summary:

entry.title: Rethinking Generalization in Reasoning SFT: A Conditional Analysis on Optimization, Data, and Model Capability
entry.summary:
A prevailing narrative in LLM post-training holds that supervised finetuning (SFT) memorizes while reinforcement learning (RL) generalizes. We revisit this claim for reasoning SFT with long chain-of-t...
